blocks.content:
Congratulations on completing this path! Job well done!

You have successfully:

- Navigated to the Silences page
- Created a silence with label matchers
- Set a duration for the suppression window
- Added a comment explaining the reason
- Verified the silence is active and matching the correct alerts

---

### More to explore

Now that you've created a silence, keep in mind:

- Silences expire automatically after the duration ends
- To end a silence early, click **Unsilence** on the Silences page
- Expired silences are removed after 5 days
- [Silences documentation](https://grafana.com/docs/grafana/latest/alerting/configure-notifications/create-silence/) for the full reference

---

### Related paths

Consider taking the following paths after you complete this one:

- [Configure a mute timing](/docs/learning-paths/configure-mute-timing/) for recurring schedule-based suppression
- [Edit the default notification policy](/docs/learning-paths/alerting-edit-default-policy/) to control where unmatched alerts go
